name: praxis-lvk
description: Praxis domain pack for ground-based gravitational-wave astronomy (LIGO-Virgo-KAGRA / GWOSC). The flagship 'Siren' pack: a live-API (tier LIVE) GWTC event catalog with asymmetric uncertainties, per-catalog DOIs, and precomputed superlatives, served through the core cache engine. Turns Praxis into a fluent LVK co-scientist.
